query: What is the most recent NIFC National Fire News year-to-date acres burned figure for 2026, latest available as of late June 2026? Report the exact YTD acres and date.
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the key finding:

**The most recent NIFC year-to-date acres-burned figure available as of late June 2026 is 3,138,394 acres (from 35,884 wildfires), reported in the official Incident Management Situation Report dated Tuesday, June 30, 2026 (0730 MDT).**

This is the authoritative "latest available as of late June" figure, sourced directly from NIFC's IMSR (published by the National Interagency Coordination Center), which underlies the public "National Fire News" and "Statistics" pages.

Key context:
- **June 27, 2026 IMSR** (last weekend report): 2,951,605 acres, 35,424 fires
- **June 30, 2026 IMSR** (final report of the month): **3,138,394 acres, 35,884 fires** — YTD acres crossed 3 million between these two dates
- The National Preparedness Level rose from PL 3 to PL 4 over this period
- YTD acres were running at ~159% of the 2016–2025 ten-year average — a notably active early season
- Note: NIFC's *live* Statistics/National Fire News pages update continuously and by ~July 12, 2026 already showed ~3,578,017 acres / 38,956 fires, so those live pages no longer reflect the late-June value — the archived June 27/June 30 IMSRs are the correct sources.

sources.title: Incident Management Situation Report - Tuesday June 30, 2026 (0730 MDT)
sources.snippet: Fires and Acres Year-to-Date (by Protection): TOTAL FIRES 35,884; TOTAL ACRES 3,138,394. National Preparedness Level 4. Acres 159% of ten-year average.

sources.title: Incident Management Situation Report - Saturday June 27, 2026 (0730 MDT)
sources.snippet: Fires and Acres Year-to-Date (by Protection): TOTAL FIRES 35,424; TOTAL ACRES 2,951,605. National Preparedness Level 3. Acres 161% of ten-year average.

sources.title: National Wildfire Update June 2026: Rising Fire Activity and Resource Demand
sources.snippet: National Fire News June 22, 2026: 34,038 fires have burned more than 2.7 million acres; National Preparedness Level increased to PL3.

sources.title: Statistics | National Interagency Fire Center
sources.snippet: Current National Statistics (live, ~July 12, 2026): 38,956 Year-to-date Wildfires; 3,578,017 Acres Year-to-date Acres Burned. Source is the Incident Management Situation Report.

sources.title: National Fire News | National Interagency Fire Center
sources.snippet: So far this year, 38,956 fires have burned more than 3.5 million acres across the United States (live page, ~mid-July 2026).
